products.label: SIMTECH Products
products.title: A Digital Product Ecosystem for
products.description: SIMTECH develops digital products designed to improve process efficiency, data visibility, service quality, and decision-making across healthcare, government, and enterprise sectors.

items.title: Hospital Information System
items.description: An integrated hospital management platform supporting registration, outpatient services, inpatient care, pharmacy, cashier operations, and electronic medical records within one digital ecosystem.
benefits: Integrates service processes across hospital units
Improves service speed and operational consistency
Supports more structured operational data management

items.title: RFID Monitoring
items.description: An RFID-based monitoring solution to track asset movement and operational activities faster, more automatically, and more transparently through analytical dashboards.
benefits: More accurate asset and item movement tracking
Reduces manual recording and potential errors
Supports data-driven operational decisions

items.title: Mobile Apps
items.description: Mobile applications for healthcare services, business activities, and customer service needs, enabling faster access to information and operational workflows from anywhere.
benefits: Expands organizational access to digital services
Improves field-user productivity
Connects with core systems and business processes

items.title: HR & Fintech System
items.description: An integrated platform for HR administration and financial activities, covering employee management, attendance, payroll, reimbursement, and financial monitoring.
benefits: Simplifies HR and finance processes
Reduces manual administrative work
Provides better management visibility

items.title: IoT Dashboard
items.description: A centralized dashboard for monitoring devices, sensors, and operational data in real time, equipped with insights, alerts, and intuitive analytics.
benefits: Real-time monitoring of devices and operational conditions
Supports faster responses to anomalies
Improves control over assets and field processes

items.title: DevSecOps Monitoring Dashboard
items.description: An integrated dashboard for monitoring system performance, deployment activity, service availability, and security indicators in a single operational view.
benefits: Strengthens service observability and reliability
Supports faster incident response
Unifies development, security, and infrastructure perspectives

items.title: Cybersecurity Assessment & Monitoring
items.description: A cybersecurity solution that helps organizations identify risks, assess vulnerabilities, monitor threat indicators, and prioritize system security improvements more effectively.
benefits: Identifies vulnerabilities, misconfigurations, and key risk areas
Supports security posture monitoring through dashboards and priority indicators
Provides a basis for hardening, mitigation, and security control improvement

services.label: SIMTECH Services
services.title: Technology Support from
services.description: SIMTECH supports organizations end-to-end: understanding business needs, preparing solution blueprints, building systems, integrating data, establishing technical foundations, and ensuring implementation is more structured.
services.outputsTitle: What clients gain from this service

items.title: Discovery & Business Assessment
items.desc: An initial phase to understand client needs comprehensively, from operational challenges and business processes to system readiness and the most relevant digital priorities.
details: Business and operational needs analysis
Workflow, pain point, and system gap mapping
Identification of solution priorities and improvement opportunities
Foundation for scope, roadmap, and early recommendations
items.value: Helps organizations begin technology initiatives from the right problem, not merely from feature requests.

items.title: Solution Architecture & Product Blueprint
items.desc: Designing digital solution structures so applications, integration, data, and operational requirements are organized within a clear, realistic, and scalable architecture.
details: Module, user flow, and system structure design
Application architecture, integration, and data flow
Technology approach tailored to actual needs
Implementation blueprint as a development reference
items.value: Reduces project misalignment risks and ensures systems are built on a strong design foundation from the outset.

items.title: Custom Software Development
items.desc: Development of web applications, mobile apps, dashboards, and operational systems tailored to organizational needs and field user workflows.
details: Frontend, backend, and database development
Role-based workflows aligned to operational needs
Management dashboards and activity monitoring
Testing, validation, and refinement with users
items.value: Delivers systems that do not merely work technically, but genuinely support user activities.

items.title: System Integration & Data Platform
items.desc: Integration services and stronger data flows to reduce information fragmentation, connect processes, and provide better management visibility.
details: API integration and data synchronization
Information exchange flows across applications
Data management for dashboards and reporting
Simplification of cross-functional and cross-unit processes
items.value: Helps organizations move from siloed systems toward connected digital ecosystems.

items.title: Infrastructure, Cloud & DevSecOps
items.desc: Strengthening technical foundations through infrastructure design, deployment, monitoring, baseline security, and operational readiness for more stable systems.
details: Application and database environment design
Deployment flow, backup, monitoring, and alerting
DevSecOps approach for more controlled delivery
Improved reliability, observability, and scale-up readiness
items.value: Ensures digital solutions have stronger technical foundations that are safer, measurable, and more resilient in use.

items.title: Cybersecurity Assessment, Hardening & Monitoring
items.desc: Security strengthening services through risk assessment, vulnerability review, configuration hardening, and targeted recommendations for improving security controls.
details: Security assessment across applications, servers, and infrastructure environments
Identification of vulnerabilities, misconfigurations, and access risks
Hardening recommendations, stronger access controls, and secure configuration
Security follow-up roadmap for gradual improvement
items.value: Helps organizations improve security readiness in a measurable way, reduce operational risks, and build stronger digital protection foundations.

items.title: Implementation Support & Continuous Improvement
items.desc: Implementation assistance, stabilization, and phased enhancement so developed solutions are adopted by users and continue evolving with organizational needs.
details: Go-live support and early user assistance
Issue logging, feedback, and improvement backlog management
Process refinement based on field evaluation
Recommendations for the next implementation phase
items.value: Encourages implementation continuity so systems do not stop at launch, but keep delivering value.

portfolio.label: Portfolio & Experience
portfolio.title: A Track Record of Solutions and
portfolio.description: SIMTECH combines project implementation experience, digital product development, infrastructure support, and involvement in enterprise-scale and government initiatives.
portfolio.featuredTitle: Examples of solutions developed and directed around real field needs
portfolio.experienceDescription: Beyond building products and applications, SIMTECH also brings experience in solution architecture, infrastructure strengthening, business process analysis, and formal deliverables for complex projects.
portfolio.ctaTitle: Planning a digital project with complex requirements?
portfolio.ctaDescription: SIMTECH can assist from early-stage analysis and solution design to system development and more structured implementation support.

items.title: Rescue & Modernization of RSUD dr. Slamet HIS
items.desc: Support for improving the hospital information system so priority module flows become more stable and better aligned with operational needs.
items.challenge: The hospital required support to restructure an existing system from the perspective of workflow, module priorities, and effectiveness of use.
items.solution: SIMTECH entered through assessment, needs analysis, critical-point improvement, and the gradual definition of a system strengthening direction.
items.goal: Improve system control, clarify improvement priorities, and help hospital operations run more effectively.

items.title: RFID Linen & Laundry
items.desc: A linen monitoring solution to help hospitals reduce manual recording and improve visibility over asset circulation.
items.challenge: Linen moves across operational areas, creating the need for faster, more measurable, and traceable recording methods.
items.solution: The solution combines RFID tags, reading devices, and monitoring dashboards to record movement and linen status more systematically.
items.goal: Increase inventory accuracy, accelerate monitoring, and strengthen control over linen circulation.

items.title: Hospital Curtain Production & Management Monitoring App
items.desc: A mobile application for capturing customer needs, order approvals, and production progress monitoring in a more integrated manner.
items.challenge: Field and production processes previously relied heavily on manual notes and fragmented communication.
items.solution: Development of an Android application so field teams, admins, and production units have clearer data entry, approval, and monitoring flows.
items.goal: Support work efficiency, accelerate coordination, and establish better-documented order histories.

items.title: Operational Monitoring & Data Dashboard
items.desc: A dashboard approach that helps leaders and operational teams view important indicators in a more concise and structured way.
items.challenge: Scattered operational data made it difficult for management to understand actual conditions and determine follow-up priorities.
items.solution: Design of a concise dashboard based on user needs, focused on indicators, task status, and progress visibility.
items.goal: Encourage faster decisions, clearer communication, and stronger operational control.

experiences.desc: Support for national-level digital infrastructure environments, including servers, platforms, technical coordination, and implementation readiness.

testimonials.label: Why SIMTECH
testimonials.title: A Technology Partner that Thinks in Terms of Business and Implementation
testimonials.description: SIMTECH is not only a technology developer, but a partner that helps organizations understand their needs, shape the right solutions, and ensure implementation remains relevant to real business processes.

reasons.title: Understanding Operational Problems
reasons.text: We translate business needs, process bottlenecks, and field realities into solution designs that are more relevant to execute.

reasons.title: More Than Application Development
reasons.text: SIMTECH's approach covers workflows, data, integration, supporting infrastructure, and overall implementation readiness.

reasons.title: Suitable for Complex Needs
reasons.text: We are accustomed to handling non-uniform requirements, multiple stakeholders, and initiatives that need to be developed in stages.

reasons.title: A More Measurable Approach
reasons.text: Large requirements are broken down into priorities, phases, and clearer implementation directions so projects remain more controlled.

faq.label: FAQ
faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: A few initial answers to help clarify SIMTECH's approach, solution models, and how we support organizations with digital needs.
faq.ctaTitle: Still have a more specific requirement?
faq.ctaDescription: Every organization has a different context and readiness level. SIMTECH can help map initial needs before determining the most suitable solution approach.

items.a: No. SIMTECH focuses on broader digital solutions: web applications, mobile apps, dashboards, monitoring systems, RFID, and support for strengthening existing systems.

items.q: Can SIMTECH help improve a system that is already running?
items.a: Yes. We can begin with assessment, priority issue identification, roadmap development, and then continue with phased improvements.

items.q: Does every solution need to be built from scratch?
items.a: Not always. We assess whether the need is best addressed through a new build, enhancement of an existing system, or a phased approach to make the investment more effective.

items.q: Is SIMTECH suitable for hospitals and public institutions?
items.a: Yes. Our focus is strong in environments with complex operational processes, multiple stakeholders, and the need for better data integration and control.

items.q: How do we start discussing our needs?
items.a: Prospective clients can contact SIMTECH through the contact form or WhatsApp. From there, we help map the initial need and define the most suitable next step.
